hypothesis: An active-learning ML-SSNEB framework that uses an ensemble of ML surrogates to quantify uncertainty in energies, forces, and stresses and triggers targeted DFT evaluations only when uncertainty exceeds a threshold will converge to VASP-quality minimum energy pathways with significantly fewer DFT calls across CsPbI3, TiO2, and other polymorphic solids, thereby improving robustness to stress-related distortions beyond what static pre-trained models achieve.
